theme.rationale: Sleek, professional, high-end SaaS aesthetic. Replaces the 'too much white' with a deep, authoritative dark mode that allows the brand's primary Kiosk Orange (#FF5C00) to pop powerfully. This builds trust while maintaining a modern, cutting-edge software feel.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#FF5C00]

visual_enhancers.noise: Apply a subtle SVG noise overlay or CSS grain (opacity 2-3%) over dark backgrounds to remove digital flatness and add a premium tactile feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use strict 1px borders (border-white/5 or border-white/10). No soft muddy shadows; rely on crisp contrast.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Use gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned for textual dominance. Center align only for specific floating CTAs.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) with intentional asymmetry.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5C00] text-white hover:bg-[#E65300] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium

cards.default: bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:bg-[#1C1C1F] hover:border-white/15 transition-all duration-300
cards.highlighted: bg-[#121214] border border-[#FF5C00]/30 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_30px_-10px_rgba(255,92,0,0.15)]

components.navigation: Sticky top, z-50. Glassmorphic header (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#09090b]/70 border-b border-white/10`). Must have desktop links visible, not hidden in hamburger.

header.description: Sticky top nav with logo (Kiosk icon), Links (Functies, Prijzen, Contact), and CTAs (Inloggen, Start gratis).

hero.layout: Min-h-[85vh] flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden.
hero.visuals: Dark slate background with a strong orange radial glow from top-right. Subtle noise texture.
hero.content: Left-aligned massive H1 'De complete huurbeheer oplossing voor vastgoed'. Orange overline 'Modern. Strak. Automatisch.'. Two buttons (Primary: Start gratis, Secondary: Inloggen).

stats_strip.layout: Grid of 4 items (24/7, 3 valutas, 13+ functies, 100% mobile-first) placed inside a glassmorphic container overlapping the bottom of the hero section or just below it (-mt-12 or similar).

features_bento.layout: Bento Grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6`). 13 features.
features_bento.special_treatment: Make the 'Kiosk Terminal' feature span 2 columns and 2 rows (`col-span-2 row-span-2`), with an orange border and glow to emphasize the MVP feature. Other features mix 1-col and 2-col spans to create asymmetry.

cards.professional: Highlighted card (`border-[#FF5C00]/40`). SRD 5.000/maand. Include an 'Aanbevolen' (Recommended) badge in #FF5C00.

cta_banner.layout: Large rounded-3xl container, text-center py-20 px-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto.
cta_banner.visuals: Deep dark surface with intense orange mesh gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-br from-[#121214] to-[#1a0a03] border border-[#FF5C00]/20`).

footer.content: Grid layout for contact info (+597 881 5993, info@surirent.sr, Paramaribo) and branding.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards should slightly lift (`-translate-y-1`) and increase border opacity on hover. Buttons should shift background color smoothly.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up (`opacity-0 translate-y-4` to `opacity-100 translate-y-0`) for Bento grid items.
motion_and_interactions.kiosk_glow: The Kiosk feature card should have a slow, pulsing box-shadow glow in orange.

images.description: Modern apartment building with curved balconies and large windows.
Modern apartment buildings against a clear blue sky.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over orange buttons meets 4.5:1 contrast. Use pure white text on the #FF5C00 background for clarity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the exact hex codes provided. Build the layout using standard HTML/Tailwind directly in the React component for the marketing sections. Ensure the 'Kiosk' feature stands out massively in the bento grid. Make the background deep black (#09090b) and use the radial gradient classes for the orange mesh glow. Do NOT use standard flat white cards. Apply data-testid to every button and link.
